attacking_style: Engages in long-range breakaway attempts rather than explosive late attacks, typically getting caught inside final 15km without decisive positioning to convert.
team_tactics: Operates independently without dedicated team support in finals, relying on personal positioning and finishing speed rather than organized leadout.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling finales where consistent top-5 finishing speed can be deployed; struggles to convert breakaway efforts into results when caught.
vulnerability: Long-range breakaway efforts lack the decisive power to hold off organized pelotons; absence of team support in critical final kilometers limits winning opportunities.
key_patterns: Demonstrates consistent top-5 finishing speed when arriving in bunch sprints (BinckBank 4th place)
Attempts long-range breakaways that get absorbed 14-15km from finish without conversion ability
Operates without team support in finals, collecting minor placings through individual positioning
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows consistent finishing capability but no evidence of progression in converting efforts to wins across 2018-2019 period
